gravatar-checker.whatItIs: The Gravatar Checker looks up Gravatar profile images and information associated with an email address. See the profile picture, name, and public profile details linked to any Gravatar-enabled email.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Gravatar Checker

steps.name: Enter email address
steps.text: Type the email address you want to check for a Gravatar profile. The tool hashes the email and queries the Gravatar service.

steps.name: Lookup Gravatar
steps.text: Click lookup to check for a Gravatar profile. The tool shows the profile image, name, and public profile details if found.

steps.name: View profile details
steps.text: See the Gravatar profile image at different sizes. View the profile name, description, and linked URLs if publicly available.

steps.name: Download image
steps.text: Download the Gravatar profile image for use in your application or contact management system.

faqs.question: What is Gravatar?
faqs.answer: Gravatar (Globally Recognized Avatar) is a service that associates profile images with email addresses. Websites and applications can display the same avatar across different platforms.

faqs.question: Do I need to create an account?
faqs.answer: No, you only need the email address associated with the Gravatar. The tool hashes the email and queries Gravatar without any authentication.

faqs.question: Can I check Gravatar without the email?
faqs.answer: If you know the MD5 hash of the email, you can look up the Gravatar directly using the hash. The tool can also compute the hash from the email.

faqs.question: Is the Gravatar Checker free?
faqs.answer: Yes, looking up Gravatar profiles is completely free with unlimited usage.

gravatar-checker.seoDescription: Check Gravatar profiles online for free. Look up profile images and details by email address. Download Gravatar avatars instantly.

duplicate-image-finder.whatItIs: The Duplicate Image Finder scans folders and devices for duplicate and similar images. Reclaim storage space by identifying and removing duplicate photos, screenshots, and image files.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Duplicate Image Finder

steps.name: Select folders to scan
steps.text: Choose the folders or drives you want to scan for duplicate images. Select specific directories or scan your entire device.

steps.name: Start scanning
steps.text: Click scan to find duplicate and similar images. The tool uses perceptual hashing to identify exact and near-duplicate images.

steps.name: Review duplicates
steps.text: Browse the grouped duplicates with image previews. Select which versions to keep and which to delete.

steps.name: Delete duplicates
steps.text: Confirm and delete selected duplicates. The tool moves files to trash or deletes them permanently based on your settings.

faqs.question: How does it detect similar images?
faqs.answer: The tool uses perceptual hashing (pHash) to identify images that look similar even if they have different file sizes, resolutions, or slight modifications.

faqs.question: Will it scan my cloud storage?
faqs.answer: The basic tool scans local files. Premium versions can scan cloud storage services like Google Drive, Dropbox, and OneDrive.

faqs.question: Are deleted images recoverable?
faqs.answer: Deleted images go to your system trash/recycle bin by default. Use the permanent delete option only when you are sure you don't need the duplicates.

faqs.question: Is the Duplicate Image Finder free?
faqs.answer: Basic duplicate scanning is free. Premium plans offer cloud scanning, advanced similarity detection, and batch operations.

duplicate-image-finder.seoDescription: Find duplicate images online and locally. Scan folders for exact and similar image duplicates. Reclaim storage space with duplicate photo finder.

image-compressor.whatItIs: The Image Compressor reduces image file sizes while maintaining quality for faster website loading and email attachments. Compress JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images with adjustable quality settings.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Image Compressor

steps.name: Upload images
steps.text: Select the images you want to compress. You can upload JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF files individually or in batch.

steps.name: Set quality level
steps.text: Choose the compression quality from high (minimal compression) to low (maximum compression). Preview the quality difference.

steps.name: Compress images
steps.text: Click compress to reduce file sizes. The tool shows before and after file sizes with savings percentage.

steps.name: Download compressed images
steps.text: Download individual compressed images or all as a ZIP archive. Use the optimized images for web or email.

faqs.question: How much can image compression reduce file size?
faqs.answer: Typical compression reduces file sizes by 50-80% while maintaining acceptable quality. The exact reduction depends on the original image and quality setting.

faqs.question: Does compression affect image quality?
faqs.answer: Higher quality settings preserve most of the original quality. Lower settings introduce more compression artifacts. Preview the results before downloading.

faqs.question: Can I compress PNG with transparency?
faqs.answer: Yes, PNG transparency is preserved during compression. The tool optimizes PNG files without losing the alpha channel.

faqs.question: Is the Image Compressor free?
faqs.answer: Yes, compressing images is completely free with unlimited usage.

image-compressor.seoDescription: Compress images online for free. Reduce JPG, PNG, WebP file sizes while maintaining quality. Batch image compression for faster website loading.
